_note: Sample evidence fixture — not real sourced content. Used for local/demo mode only.

cards.title: Fed officials signal patience on rate cuts after strong payrolls
cards.author: Financial Reporter
cards.summary_raw: Multiple Fed officials reiterated a data-dependent stance following the April payrolls beat. No urgency to cut in the near term. Market-implied cuts pushed out.
cards.thesis: Fed officials indicate no rush to cut rates following strong employment data
cards.evidence: Multiple Fed speeches citing data dependence; payrolls beat consensus; market rate expectations adjusted
cards.macro_relevance: US monetary policy path affects global funding conditions and cross-asset risk appetite
cards.portfolio_relevance: Front-end rates holding higher supports USD/JPY long position; creates duration headwind for EM debt basket

cards.title: BOJ board member flags wage-inflation link as condition for further tightening
cards.author: BOJ Board Member
cards.summary_raw: BOJ board member cited sustained wage growth as a prerequisite for additional rate hikes. Divergence with Fed policy path remains wide.
cards.thesis: BOJ maintains cautious stance on further tightening, requiring wage growth confirmation
cards.evidence: Official BOJ board member statement linking wage growth to policy tightening decisions
cards.macro_relevance: Japan monetary policy divergence from Fed creates FX carry opportunities
cards.portfolio_relevance: Policy divergence narrative supports USD/JPY long position

cards.title: Gold consolidating near highs as real-yield support holds
cards.author: Research Analyst
cards.summary_raw: Research note argues gold's floor is supported by sticky real yields and persistent central bank demand. Near-term catalyst needed for breakout above 2350.
cards.thesis: Gold maintains structural support from real yield dynamics and central bank demand
cards.evidence: Analysis of real yield correlation, central bank purchase data, technical resistance levels
cards.macro_relevance: Gold performance reflects real yield environment and geopolitical risk hedging demand
cards.portfolio_relevance: Supports overweight gold allocation; key technical levels to watch for trend continuation

cards.title: China credit growth slowing amid property sector headwinds
cards.author: Economic Correspondent
cards.summary_raw: Latest credit data shows continued deceleration in new loan growth. Property sector weakness persists despite policy support measures.
cards.thesis: China growth momentum faces headwinds from continued property sector stress
cards.evidence: Official credit statistics showing loan growth deceleration; property sector indicators
cards.macro_relevance: China growth concerns affect commodity demand and EM risk sentiment
cards.portfolio_relevance: Creates headwind for EM debt basket through China spillover effects
